_comment: Hand-derived, same envelope assumption as steps.json (see its _comment). Sleep is a Session (Se) type per base-knowledge.md §3 -- its base-knowledge.md §2 nesting note ('<data_type>.<field>') doesn't specify a session's internal shape, so this assumes the session's stage breakdown arrives as a nested array under `sleep.segment` (start/end/stage per segment) rather than as scalar fields. GoogleDataPoint therefore captures an empty/near-empty `values` dict and preserves the whole `value` object verbatim as `sessionPayload` (WP-05 step 2). Stage-name -> HKCategoryValueSleepAnalysis mapping (awake/light/deep/rem/unknown) is WP-07's job, not WP-05's; this fixture only needs to prove sessionPayload round-trips.
